issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toUpperCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Field requires API level 26 (current min is 23): `android.media.AudioDeviceInfo#TYPE_USB_HEADSET`
Call requires API level 24 (current min is 23): `android.content.Context#createDeviceProtectedStorageContext`
Call requires API level 24, or core library desugaring (current min is 23): `java.util.function.Function#apply`
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
A newer version of Gradle than 8.14.2 is available: 8.14.4
A newer version of `compileSdkVersion` than 35 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.2.1 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.6.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of androidx.test:runner than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.0
A newer version of androidx.test:rules than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-intents than 3.6.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of androidx.room:room-runtime than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-exoplayer than 1.7.1 is available: 1.10.0
A newer version of androidx.media3:media3-common than 1.7.1 is available: 1.10.0
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.12.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.room:room-runtime than 2.6.1 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of com.google.code.gson:gson than 2.10.1 is available: 2.13.2
A newer version of com.google.code.gson:gson than 2.10.1 is available: 2.13.2
Incorrect formatting string `app_slogan`; missing conversion character in '`% a`'?
